agentPersonalizationPage.title: Agent
agentPersonalizationPage.description: Personalize your Linear Agent to match the way you work.

guidance.title: Guidance
guidance.description: Write instructions to guide the Agent's behaviour. It will follow these guidelines when working on your behalf.
guidance.label: Custom instructions
guidance.placeholder: e.g. Always write issue descriptions in bullet points. Prefer short titles. Tag issues with the appropriate team label.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Teach the Agent reusable skills it can apply across issues and projects.
skills.emptyDescription: Skills let you define reusable actions the Agent can perform on demand.
skills.dialogDescription: Define a new reusable skill for your Linear Agent.
skills.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this skill does and when to use it.

mcpServers.title: MCP servers
mcpServers.description: Connect Model Context Protocol servers to extend the Agent's capabilities.
mcpServers.planDescription: MCP servers are configured at the workspace level by administrators. Contact your workspace admin to add or manage MCP servers.
mcpServers.toastConfigure: MCP servers are managed by your workspace administrator.
